languages.original_text: "Thank you, truly, but no. You could not. To my regret, I am all too familiar with your approach to healing."

languages.text: "Искренне благодарен, но нет. Не могли бы. К несчастью, я слишком многое знаю о вашем подходе к врачеванию".
"Thank you, truly, but no. You could not. To my regret, I am all too familiar with your approach to healing."
languages.original_text: "Искренне благодарен, но нет. Не могли бы. К несчастью, я слишком многое знаю о вашем подходе к врачеванию".

traits.locale_text: "Thank you, truly, but no. You could not. To my regret, I am all too familiar with your approach to healing."
"Thank you, truly, but no. You could not. To my regret, I am all too familiar with your approach to healing."
"Thank you, truly, but no. You could not. To my regret, I am all too familiar with your approach to healing."

languages.text: «Se lo agradezco, pero no. No podría. Muy a mi pesar, conozco bien la idea que tiene usted del tratamiento».
languages.original_text: "Thank you, truly, but no. You could not. To my regret, I am all too familiar with your approach to healing."

traits.locale_text: «Se lo agradezco, pero no. No podría. Muy a mi pesar, conozco bien la idea que tiene usted del tratamiento».

languages.text: 「礼を言う、心から。だが、結構だ。あなたにはできない。残念ながら、私はあなたの治療法というものを、いやというほどよく知っているのでね」
languages.original_text: "Thank you, truly, but no. You could not. To my regret, I am all too familiar with your approach to healing."

traits.locale_text: 「礼を言う、心から。だが、結構だ。あなたにはできない。残念ながら、私はあなたの治療法というものを、いやというほどよく知っているのでね」

languages.text: “衷心感谢，但不必了。你不可以。很遗憾，我太了解你的治疗手段了。”
languages.original_text: "Thank you, truly, but no. You could not. To my regret, I am all too familiar with your approach to healing."

traits.locale_text: “衷心感谢，但不必了。你不可以。很遗憾，我太了解你的治疗手段了。”

languages.text: "Aufrechten Dank, aber nein. Das könntet Ihr nicht. Zu meinem Bedauern bin ich mit Eurem Heilungsansatz nur allzu vertraut."
languages.original_text: "Thank you, truly, but no. You could not. To my regret, I am all too familiar with your approach to healing."

traits.locale_text: "Aufrechten Dank, aber nein. Das könntet Ihr nicht. Zu meinem Bedauern bin ich mit Eurem Heilungsansatz nur allzu vertraut."

languages.text: « Merci, vraiment, mais non. Vous ne pourriez pas. À mon grand regret, je ne connais que trop bien votre approche des soins. »
languages.original_text: "Thank you, truly, but no. You could not. To my regret, I am all too familiar with your approach to healing."

traits.locale_text: « Merci, vraiment, mais non. Vous ne pourriez pas. À mon grand regret, je ne connais que trop bien votre approche des soins. »

languages.text: "Gerçekten teşekkür ederim ama hayır. Yapamazdın. Üzülerek söylüyorum ki iyileştirme yaklaşımına fazlasıyla aşinayım."
languages.original_text: "Thank you, truly, but no. You could not. To my regret, I am all too familiar with your approach to healing."

traits.locale_text: "Gerçekten teşekkür ederim ama hayır. Yapamazdın. Üzülerek söylüyorum ki iyileştirme yaklaşımına fazlasıyla aşinayım."
